description: Reduce 19 WASM modules to 7 focused on multi-host dispatch. Migrate inference to procedures. Wire remote agent state to SpacetimeDB.

specs.description: Only 7 WASM modules exist in spacetime-modules/
specs.then: Exactly 7 directories exist: hexflo-coordination, agent-registry, inference-gateway, secret-grant, rl-engine, chat-relay, neural-lab

specs.description: All 7 WASM modules compile to wasm32-unknown-unknown
specs.given: The 7 surviving modules with all dependencies
specs.when: Running cargo check in spacetime-modules/ workspace
specs.then: All 7 modules compile with zero errors

specs.when: Counting entries in the constant array
specs.then: Exactly 7 (module, database) tuples are listed, matching the surviving modules

specs.description: Inference procedure makes direct HTTP calls to LLM providers
specs.given: An inference_request row in inference-gateway with provider='anthropic' and a valid API key in secret-grant
specs.when: The execute_inference procedure fires via scheduled table
specs.then: The procedure makes an HTTP POST to the provider's API endpoint and writes the response to inference_response table with status='completed'

specs.description: Inference fallback works when procedure is unavailable
specs.given: An inference_request with status='queued' and the procedure failing or unavailable
specs.when: hex-nexus calls the complete_inference reducer with the LLM response
specs.then: The inference_response row is created with the provided result and the request status changes to 'completed'

specs.description: Remote agent state is visible in SpacetimeDB
specs.given: A hex-agent running on Host B registering via hex-nexus REST API on Host A
specs.when: hex-nexus calls register_remote_agent reducer on hexflo-coordination
specs.then: A remote_agent row appears in SpacetimeDB with the agent's id, host, role, and status

specs.description: Dashboard shows remote agents via WebSocket subscription
specs.given: A remote_agent row in hexflo-coordination and a dashboard connected via WebSocket
specs.when: The dashboard subscribes to 'SELECT * FROM remote_agent'
specs.then: The agent appears in the AgentFleet view without HTTP polling

specs.description: compute_node table absorbed from fleet-state into hexflo-coordination
specs.given: hexflo-coordination module with compute_node table and register_node reducer
specs.when: Calling register_node with host, port, and max_agents
specs.then: A compute_node row is created; dashboard can subscribe and display fleet nodes

specs.description: Workspace builds cleanly with no references to deleted modules
specs.given: The entire Rust workspace after right-sizing
specs.then: Zero compilation errors; no unresolved imports referencing deleted modules

specs.description: No code imports from deleted spacetime_bindings modules
specs.given: The workspace after deleting 12 WASM modules
specs.when: Searching for imports of deleted module bindings (hook_registry, agent_definition_registry, remote_agent_registry, fleet_state, etc.)
specs.then: Zero matches in production code (documentation comments referencing ADR-2604050900 are acceptable)

specs.description: IStatePort does not contain methods for deleted modules without callers
specs.when: Checking for fleet_* and hook_* methods
specs.then: No fleet_register, fleet_list, fleet_remove, fleet_update_status, hook_register, hook_update, hook_remove, hook_toggle, hook_list, hook_list_by_event, or hook_log_execution methods exist in the trait

specs.description: Docker sandbox agent registers in SpacetimeDB on spawn
specs.given: A Docker sandbox with hex-agent:latest image and SpacetimeDB reachable
specs.when: hex-nexus spawns a sandbox agent via DockerSandboxAdapter::spawn()
specs.then: The agent appears in both the local HashMap (fast path) and the SpacetimeDB remote_agent table (cross-host visibility)
